debug_info.goal:
S : Type u_1
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
f : Fin n → RelIO S
⊢ PortMap.getIO (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf (RelIO S) n f) { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i } = f i

proof:
unfold RelIO.liftFinf PortMap.getIO
        rw [AssocList.find?_eq, List.toList_toAssocList, List.find?_map]
        have hpred : ((fun x => x.fst == { inst := InstIdent.top, name := (↑i : Nat) }) ∘
          fun (j : Fin n) => (({ inst := InstIdent.top, name := j.toNat } : InternalPort Nat), f j)) = (· == i) := by
          ext j
          simp only [Function.comp, BEq.beq, decide_eq_decide]
          constructor
          · intro h
            have := InternalPort.mk.inj h
            simp at this
            exact Fin.ext this
          · intro h; subst h; rfl
        rw [hpred]
        have find_lem : ∀ {α : Type _} [DecidableEq α] {a : α} {l : List α}, a ∈ l → List.find? (· == a) l = some a := by
          intro α _ a l hmem
          induction l with
          | nil => simp at hmem
          | cons hd tl ih =>
            simp only [List.find?_cons]
            split
            · next h2 => simp [beq_iff_eq] at h2; exact congrArg _ h2
            · next h2 =>
              simp [List.mem_cons] at hmem
              cases hmem with
              | inl h3 => subst h3; simp at h2
              | inr h3 => exact ih h3
        rw [find_lem (fin_in_fin_range n i)]
        simp
successful_attempts:

        rw [AssocList.find?_eq, List.toList_toAssocList, List.find?_map]
        have hpred : ((fun x => x.fst == { inst := InstIdent.top, name := (↑i : Nat) }) ∘

          constructor
          · intro h
            have := InternalPort.mk.inj h
            simp at this
            exact Fin.ext this
          · intro h; subst h; rfl
        rw [hpred]
        have find_lem : ∀ {α : Type _} [DecidableEq α] {a : α} {l : List α}, a ∈ l → List.find? (· == a) l = some a := by
          intro α _ a l hmem
          induction l with

          | cons hd tl ih =>

            split
            · next h2 => simp [beq_iff_eq] at h2; exact congrArg _ h2
            · next h2 =>

              cases hmem with
              | inl h3 => subst h3; simp at h2
              | inr h3 => exact ih h3
        rw [find_lem (fin_in_fin_range n i)]
        simp
